inputs.label: Annual Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total revenue generated by the business in the last fiscal year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total revenue generated by the business in the last fiscal year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşletmenin son mali yılda elde ettiği toplam gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtumsatz des Unternehmens im letzten Geschäftsjahr.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu total généré par l'entreprise au cours du dernier exercice fiscal.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingresos totales generados por el negocio en el último año fiscal.

inputs.label: Annual Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total operating expenses including COGS, SG&A, depreciation, but excluding interest and taxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total operating expenses including COGS, SG&A, depreciation, but excluding interest and taxes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satılan malın maliyeti, SG&A, amortisman dahil ancak faiz ve vergiler hariç toplam işletme giderleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbetriebskosten einschließlich COGS, Vertriebs- und Verwaltungskosten, Abschreibungen, jedoch ohne Zinsen und Steuern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des dépenses d'exploitation incluant COGS, SG&A, amortissement, mais excluant intérêts et impôts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos operativos totales, incluyendo COGS, SG&A, depreciación, pero excluyendo intereses e impuestos.

inputs.label: Long-term Growth Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual growth rate of cash flows into perpetuity.

label_i18n.fr: Taux de croissance à long terme
label_i18n.es: Tasa de crecimiento a largo plazo

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual growth rate of cash flows into perpetuity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nakit akışlarının sürekli olarak beklenen yıllık büyüme oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Wachstumsrate der Cashflows bis in die Ewigkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de croissance annuel attendu des flux de trésorerie à perpétuité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de crecimiento anual esperada de los flujos de efectivo a perpetuidad.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital used to discount future cash flows.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital used to discount future cash flows.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki nakit akışlarını iskonto etmek için kullanılan ağırlıklı ortalama sermaye maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewichteter durchschnittlicher Kapitalkostensatz zur Diskontierung zukünftiger Cashflows.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen pondéré du capital utilisé pour actualiser les flux de trésorerie futurs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio ponderado del capital utilizado para descontar flujos de efectivo futuros.

inputs.label: Total Assets
inputs.businessContext: Book value of total tangible and intangible assets.

businessContext_i18n.en: Book value of total tangible and intangible assets.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam maddi ve maddi olmayan duran varlıkların defter değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Buchwert aller materiellen und immateriellen Vermögenswerte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur comptable de l'ensemble des actifs corporels et incorporels.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor contable de activos tangibles e intangibles totales.

inputs.label: Total Liabilities
inputs.businessContext: Book value of total outstanding debt and other obligations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Book value of total outstanding debt and other obligations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam ödenmemiş borç ve diğer yükümlülüklerin defter değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Buchwert aller ausstehenden Schulden und sonstigen Verpflichtungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur comptable de l'ensemble des dettes et autres obligations en cours.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor contable de la deuda total y otras obligaciones pendientes.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
